modmenu.summaryTranslation.mns: loads of structures made with vanilla blocks and entities bringing life to your world! Discover loot, enemies, & more along the way!
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mns: Moogs Nether Structures adds new and exciting structures to the Nether dimension in Minecraft. You'll find new loot, tough enemies, and fun challenges as you explore. This mod works great on its own or with our main structure mod, MVS. It fits well into any modpack and keeps the vanilla feel of the game. Jump into the Nether and see what you can discover!
